sample_definition: All qualifying US IPOs since 2022-10 with day-1-close entry.
study15_model_usage: Start with a harsh prior: chasing new listings has underperformed SPY.

sample_definition: Sector table separates survivor buckets from weak/noisy IPO buckets.
filter_or_scope: Software/IT and REIT survived; biotech and micro-cap/unclassified failed.
study15_model_usage: Used as a quality gate: remove small/noisy IPOs and avoid binary biotech/promotional listings.

sample_definition: Core plus scale IPO comps with market cap above $5B and proceeds above $500M.
study15_model_usage: This is the six-month price-return midpoint used as the Study 15 model base prior.

filter_or_scope: SpaceX plus filtered comps and explicitly excluded/noisy rows
study15_model_usage: Predictions start at the filtered large-IPO prior, while beat-SPY probability starts from Study 15's 180-day 25% rate.
